nasb.text: The Mighty One, God, the Lord, has spoken, And summoned the earth from the rising of the sun to its setting.

esv.text: The Mighty One, God the Lord, speaks and summons the earth from the rising of the sun to its setting.

cnv.text: 大能者　神耶和華已經說話， 從日出之地到日落之處呼喚大地。

ccb.text: 从日出之地到日落之处， 大能的上帝耶和华召唤世人。

csbs.text: 大能的神耶和华已经发话， 他从日出之地到日落之处呼唤大地。
